description: Introduced in 1987, The puma TX-3 is a technologically classic running shoe that features a 3-density wedge. It's stylish design with suede, synthetic leather and fabric combination upper makes this a sporty casual footwear. This pair comes with a shoe bag. Upper Suede, mesh, synthetic leather and fabric combination upper Midly padded tongue and collar for comfort Lacing system for a snug, customised Fit Padded footbed for all-day comfort Midsole EVA midsole for impact protection Outsole Three-density wedge blown rubber outsole with waffle pattern lugs for absolute grip and traction External TPU heel counter with a metatersal flex pad for enhanced shock absorption Shoe care Wipe surface with a clean and damp cloth to remove dust Clean the suede overlays with a suede brush Do not machine wash or store in direct sunlight
